context_note: Brazil vs Haiti, WC2026 Group G. Brazil MASSIVE favorite: λ_BRA=3.387, λ_HAI=0.585. FTR: Brazil 88.51%, Draw 7.55%, Haiti 4.01%. Essentially a GER-CUR level mismatch. 2+ offsides family applies to Haiti (defensive underdog). RULE15 applies to Nazon (Haiti primary forward). NO RULE8 (draw=7.55% — well below 25% threshold). Most corners: Brazil 90.15%, Haiti 5.73%.

rules_applied.RULE15_Nazon: Haiti win prob ~4%. Nazon is expected-loser primary forward. Full RULE15: -10pp from illiq-adj market 0.3526 → 0.25.
rules_applied.2plus_offsides_family_Q2: Haiti 2+ offsides: Haiti barely attacks (λ_goals=0.585). 10/10 NO family. λ_offside_HAI estimated 0.25-0.30. P(≥2) ≈ 0.03-0.04. Floor at 0.10.
rules_applied.RULE7_dominant_favorite: Brazil >88% favorite. Like GER-CUR. All 'Haiti does something attacking' props are likely NO. Crowd will over-credit Haiti.
rules_applied.NO_RULE8: Draw price only 7.55% — well below 25% threshold. RULE8 does NOT fire. This is a blowout-script match.
rules_applied.direct_markets: Q6 BRA FTR=0.885, Q7 2H BRA OU0.5=0.849, Q9 BRA OU2.5=0.639, Q5 most cards Haiti=0.556 — all liquid direct markets.
rules_applied.RULE10_fouls: Most cards market: Haiti 55.6%, Brazil 19.2%. Haiti fouls more as defensive underdog. Q1 (Brazil more fouls) = LOW at 0.25.

Q1_BRA_more_fouls.note: Card market: Haiti 55.6% most cards vs Brazil 19.2%. Haiti fouls much more as deep-defending underdog.

Q2_HAI_2plus_offsides.note: 10/10 NO family. Haiti barely attacks (λ_goals=0.585). λ_off estimated 0.25-0.30 → P(≥2)≈0.03-0.04. Floor at 0.10.

Q3_HAI_1plus_SOT_2H.note: λ_HAI_SOT_2H=1.0 → P(≥1)=0.632. Slight shade for dominant blowout suppression → 0.58.

Q5_HAI_more_cards.note: DIRECT most cards market: Haiti 55.61%. Trust the market.

Q6_BRA_wins.note: RULE1: FTR market 0.8851. avg(crowd_est ~0.86, market 0.885) = 0.87-0.88. RULE6: don't go to 1.00.

Q7_BRA_score_2H.note: DIRECT 2H BRA OU0.5 Over = 0.8490. Trust the market.

Q8_HAI_3plus_corners.note: λ_HAI_corners=2.25 → P(≥3)=0.391. Cross-check: OU3.5 Over=0.1918 ≈ P(≥4)=0.191 ✓. Slight shade for dominant possession.

Q9_BRA_3plus_goals.note: DIRECT BRA OU2.5 Over = 0.6391. Trust the market. Brazil expected to score 3.4 goals.

Q10_Nazon_SOT.note: Illiq market 0.3526. Full RULE15 (Haiti 4% win prob, Nazon primary forward). -10pp → 0.25.

match_facts.notable: ALL 3 Brazil goals scored in 1H. BRA had 0 goals in 2H despite 0.85 estimate. Haiti got 4 offsides (vs our 0.10 estimate).

Q1_BRA_more_fouls.notes: HAI 14 > BRA 13 fouls. outcome=NO. Beat crowd.

Q2_HAI_2plus_offsides.notes: HAI 4 offsides. outcome=YES. CATASTROPHIC MISS. Worst single question loss ever? We estimated 0.10, crowd 0.40. HAI chased from 0-3 down and pushed high line.

Q3_HAI_1plus_SOT_2H.notes: Haiti got ≥1 SOT in 2H. outcome=YES. Beat crowd slightly.

Q4_HAI_2plus_SOT_2H.notes: Haiti got 2+ SOT in 2H. outcome=YES. MISS — Haiti was chasing and got shots.

Q7_BRA_score_2H.notes: BRA scored ALL 3 in 1H, 0 in 2H. outcome=NO. Big miss. Both us and crowd badly off.

Q10_Nazon_SOT.notes: Nazon did NOT get SOT. outcome=NO. Beat crowd (we had lower estimate).

post_match_results.note: Net loss despite 7/10 beat crowd because Q2 HAI 2+ offsides miss was catastrophic (-42.56). HAI 4 offsides vs our 0.10 estimate.
